notices.title: Mooloolah River Bar — standing notices
notices.summary: Coastal bar subject to continual shoaling and periodic dredging. Maritime Safety Queensland issues recurring Notices to Mariners for this bar (e.g. NtM 501 of 2025 and predecessors).
notices.detail: Plan your crossing with careful consideration of prevailing conditions, the state of tide, and your vessel's draught. Coastal bars are dynamic — depths change constantly and can differ significantly from charted values. Lifejackets must be worn when crossing designated coastal bars in open boats / open areas of boats (QLD requirement). A dredge may be on station maintaining the entrance and keeps a listening watch on VHF 16/82. Always check the CURRENT notice before crossing.
